productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Boy's Kaden Grey Blue Kidswear
description: Compositiontop: Grey round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with white raglan sleeves, light green strip from shoulder to sleeve hem and graphic, and light embroidery and applique shorts: denim shorts made of cotton fabric, with elasticated waist, two insert pockets on the sides, patch pockets on the back with embroidery, patch pocket on the front near left leg hem, and patch pocket on the back with asymmetric opening on the back of right legFittingTop: Regular98 cm (24-30 months)Shorts: Regular 98 cm (24-30 months)Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Bring out the happy sailor side in your little boy in this grey and blue tee and denim shorts combo from gini and jony. The childish doodle of the boat and the sailor inspired words "travel with wind and paper" on the chest add to the carefree sea loving spirit of this tee. Team this with the super comfy denim shorts and crocs for happy, casual outings with your little one, while the pure cotton fabric stays soft on his skin and keeps him fresh and comfortable all day.
